name: RAGFlow
description: Open-source RAG engine with deep document understanding, hybrid search and agent orchestration by Chinese startup InfiniFlow.

seo.title: RAGFlow — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: RAGFlow: Open-source RAG engine with deep document understanding, hybrid search and agent orchestration by Chinese startup InfiniFlow.

when_to_use: Self-hosting a production-grade RAG engine over enterprise docs
Chunking and indexing complex PDFs and tables for retrieval
Building knowledge-grounded chatbots with citation support
Running hybrid search combining keyword and vector retrieval

pros: Deep document understanding for tables and PDFs
Hybrid search out of the box
cons: Fewer managed integrations vs Ragie or LlamaIndex Cloud
review.verdict: Great OSS alternative to managed RAG if you can host it and want full control over the pipeline.
review.best_for: Engineering teams wanting self-hosted, customizable RAG
review.not_for: Small teams who just want a managed RAG endpoint
